name: Mira Voss
appearance: A road-worn Stensian woman in patched mail with a travel cloak, a lantern, and a silver Avacyn collar at her throat.
personality: Steady, practical, suspicious of miracles but unwilling to abandon the innocent.
ideals: Courage is what remains when faith becomes difficult.
bonds: Sent from the Church to locate Katarina Brunn and recover the Strionic Resonator if necessary.
flaws: Too quick to shoulder responsibility that should be shared.
notes: Default starter hero for the Army of the Damned pack. She is traveling from Thraben toward Shadowgrange when play begins.
